summary: Iteration 115: Outlet Menu Catalog + Dish Assembly feature fully tested. Backend: 18/18 tests PASSED (100%). Frontend: All 4 tabs (Outlets, Menus, Dish Assembly, Test Order) verified working with correct data display and interactions.
critical_code_review_comments: Outlet seeding correctly creates 4 outlets: Signature Italian (fine_dining), Rooftop Lounge (lounge), Pool Bar & Grill (casual_dining), Family Dining (family_dining)
4 menus seeded with ~98 items auto-routed to POS with correct GL accounts and chit printers
Signature Italian menu has 7 sections: CAVIAR, RAW BAR/CRUDO, PASTA, APPETIZERS, ENTREES, FOR THE TABLE, VEGETABLES
Rooftop Lounge menu includes COCKTAILS, WINE, BEER, SPIRIT FREE sections with GL/BTL pricing for wines
Pool Bar menu has MAINS (burgers, tacos, quesadillas) and DESSERTS with dietary flags (D, GF, V, VE, N)
Family Dining Kids Breakfast menu has crepes, waffles, pancakes with dietary flags
Dish Assembly generates production steps based on item type: grill for burgers, pasta station for linguine, bar for cocktails, pastry for desserts
POS Router integration shows 98 outlet_menu source items in dashboard
All data-testid attributes present for automated testing
seed_data_creation: Outlets and menus seeded via POST /api/outlet-menus/seed-outlets. Creates 4 outlets, 4 menus, ~98 items routed to POS.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 115 tested Outlet Menu Catalog + Dish Assembly. All backend APIs working: seed-outlets, outlets list, menus list, menu detail, menu items flat, dish-assembly ticket creation, queue, complete. Frontend panel accessible via CULINARY OPERATIONS sidebar section. 4 outlets (out-signature, out-rooftop, out-poolbar, out-family), 4 menus (om-signature-v1, om-rooftop-v1, om-poolbar-v1, om-family-v1), ~98 items routed to POS. Dish assembly generates production steps per item type.

backend_api_tests: POST /api/outlet-menus/seed-outlets - seeds 4 outlets and 4 menus - PASSED
GET /api/outlet-menus/outlets - returns 4 outlets (Signature Italian, Rooftop Lounge, Pool Bar & Grill, Family Dining) - PASSED
GET /api/outlet-menus/om-signature-v1 - returns full Signature Italian menu with 7 sections - PASSED
GET /api/outlet-menus/om-signature-v1/items - returns flat items list with Lobster Linguine, Bisteca - PASSED
GET /api/outlet-menus/om-rooftop-v1 - returns Rooftop Lounge menu with COCKTAILS, WINE, BEER sections - PASSED
GET /api/outlet-menus/om-poolbar-v1 - returns Pool Bar menu with MAINS, DESSERTS - PASSED
GET /api/outlet-menus/om-family-v1 - returns Family Dining kids breakfast menu - PASSED
POST /api/outlet-menus/dish-assembly/ticket (Latin Burger) - routes to kitchen_hot with grill steps - PASSED
POST /api/outlet-menus/dish-assembly/ticket (Noir Martini) - routes to bar with bar steps - PASSED
POST /api/outlet-menus/dish-assembly/ticket (Lobster Linguine) - routes to kitchen_hot with pasta station steps - PASSED
POST /api/outlet-menus/dish-assembly/ticket (Sorbet Frutina) - gets pastry station steps - PASSED
PUT /api/outlet-menus/dish-assembly/{ticket_id}/complete - marks ticket as completed - PASSED
GET /api/pos-router/dashboard - shows outlet_menu source count >= 90 - PASSED
frontend_ui_tests: Outlet Menu Manager panel opens via CULINARY OPERATIONS sidebar - PASSED
Panel has 4 tabs: Outlets, Menus, Dish Assembly, Test Order - PASSED
Outlets tab shows 4 outlet cards with View Menu button - PASSED
Outlet cards show name, cuisine, location, type, bar status, kitchen printer - PASSED
View Menu button navigates to Menus tab with menu selected - PASSED
Menus tab shows 4 menus in sidebar: Signature Italian, Rooftop Lounge, Pool Bar, Family Dining - PASSED
Menu detail shows sections with collapsible items - PASSED
Test Order tab has outlet select, item input, table input, qty input, fire button - PASSED
Quick item buttons appear after selecting outlet - PASSED
Fire Order creates dish assembly ticket with production steps - PASSED
Order result shows ticket ID, chit printer, GL account, production steps - PASSED
Dish Assembly tab shows queue with 8 tickets - PASSED
Tickets show item name, outlet, table, printer, GL, price, production steps, Done button - PASSED

mocked_apis.note: All outlet menu data is seeded from PDF extraction simulations. No external integrations mocked.
